query:
SELECT 
  i.id, i.locationId, i.labelCode AS inv_labelCode, i.uniqueCode AS inv_uniqueCode, 
  i.status, i.quantity, wl.code AS locationCode, wl.zoneCode
FROM inventory i
JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON wl.id = i.locationId
WHERE i.status = 'available' AND wl.zoneCode IN ('STORAGE','ARM')
LIMIT 10;

SELECT id, labelCode, uniqueCode, unitsPerBox, status 
FROM labelAssociations 
LIMIT 10;
